title: Plan and implement a high availability and disaster recovery environment
summary: Data must be available when needed. Configure, test and manage a solution for high availability and disaster recovery using Azure tools and SQL Server tools.

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Plan and implement a high availability and disaster recovery environment
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Plan and implement a high availability and disaster recovery environment**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
